# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1  # api version
kind: Pod     # kind
metadata:    # metadata
  name: dsock-pod        # pod name
spec:          # specification of pod
  containers: 
    - image: 89045672.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/jenkins-cd-dsock-pod  # docker image we want to deploy
      securityContext:   # Security context 
        runAsUser :     
        	uid : 1001  # uid for the container
        runAsGroup: 
        	gid : 5678     # gid for the container
        runAsNonRoot : true       # whether we can run this pod as non root
      volumeMounts:          # mounts
        - name: docksocket-volume    # name of volume
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock  # where to mount volume
      workingDir:  "/home"    
  volumes:           # volume
    - name: docksocket-volume   # volume
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
